### 🛠 Code Quality Checklist
- [X] Code follows correct or clear style (indentation, naming, comments).
- [X] Error handling is present (e.g., try-catch, validation).
- [X] No commented-out code or unused variables.
- [X] Code is readable — others can understand it without explanation.
- [X] No duplicated code.

### 🧪 Testing Checklist
- [X] Happy path tested (normal inputs, expected behavior).
- [X] Edge cases tested (empty, null, max/min values).
- [X] Negative tests performed (invalid inputs, wrong data types).
- [X] No crashes or unhandled exceptions.

### 👀 Review Checklist
- [X] Self-review completed (walked through own code).
- [ ] Peer review completed.
- [X] Checked that all requirements from the QA assignment are met.
